verdict_summary: proceed — savings dashboard approved for immediate implementation, streak deferred pending results

convergence.finding: Value visibility drives Pro conversion more than gamification mechanics

strongest_signal.summary: Trial-to-paid conversion at 37% with clear drop-off at day 14-21

artifacts.description: Engineering spec for Pro savings dashboard

rationale: Savings dashboard is low-risk, high-signal. Validates the core hypothesis that value visibility drives retention before committing to gamification investment.

solutions.rationale: Approved by PM — low effort, high signal.
